title: Project NeonGrid - System Overview
author: Arasaka Systems Division
body:
Project NeonGrid is a city-scale digital payments and identity system for Night City.

Components:
1. API Gateway - handles authentication and routing
2. Payment Service - integrates with EuroBank API
3. Identity Service - stores user profiles and permissions
4. Analytics Engine - processes transaction streams
5. Operator Dashboard - internal monitoring UI

Dependencies:
- Payment Service depends on Compliance Certification
- Identity Service depends on Legacy Data Migration
- Dashboard depends on API Gateway and Analytics Engine
- All services depend on Core Auth Service

Timeline:
- Phase 1 (April): API integration
- Phase 2 (May): System testing
- Phase 3 (June): Deployment

title: Legacy System Migration Plan
author: Hanako Arasaka
body:
Legacy database contains 1.8 million citizen records.

Steps:
1. Schema mapping complete
2. Incremental sync in progress
3. Cutover planned May 10

Risks:
- 12% data inconsistency
- duplicate identity records
- missing permission fields

Impact:
Migration delays will block Identity Service and downstream user APIs.

title: Payment Integration Guide
author: Takemura Goro
body:
Payment Service integrates with EuroBank.

Endpoints:
- /payments/create
- /payments/refund
- /subscriptions/create

Constraints:
- Requires Compliance Certification before production
- Rate limit: 120 req/sec

Known Issues:
- Enterprise rate upgrade pending
- Webhook must be deployed behind API Gateway

title: Dashboard Requirements
author: Judy Alvarez
body:
Dashboard requires:
- real-time transaction status
- analytics aggregation API
- user permission management endpoint

Dependencies:
- depends on Analytics Engine
- depends on Identity Service (user permissions)

Blockers:
- user endpoints unavailable if migration incomplete

title: Compliance Certification Overview
author: Anders Hellman
body:
Certification requirements:
- encryption at rest
- penetration testing
- audit review

Timeline:
- encryption complete April 12
- testing April 15-17
- certification earliest April 20

Impact:
Payment Service cannot go live without certification.

title: Analytics Engine Design
author: Alt Cunningham
body:
Analytics Engine uses event streaming.

Inputs:
- payment events
- user activity logs

Outputs:
- dashboard metrics
- fraud alerts

Dependency:
requires Payment Service event stream

title: Core Auth Service
author: NetWatch Division
body:
Handles authentication and token validation.

All services require Core Auth Service.

Failure in auth blocks API Gateway and all downstream services.

title: API Gateway Design
author: Takemura Goro
body:
API Gateway handles routing and rate limiting.

Dependencies:
- Core Auth Service

Required for:
- Payment Service webhooks
- Dashboard APIs

title: Rate Limiting Risk Note
author: Takemura Goro
body:
Current limit is 120 req/sec.
Projected need is 400 req/sec.

Risk:
may cause transaction delays during peak load.

title: Deployment Plan
author: Hanako Arasaka
body:
Deployment requires:
- completed migration
- compliance certification
- API readiness

Target date: June 5

title: Identity Service Design
author: Hanako Arasaka
body:
Identity Service stores profiles and permissions.

Depends on:
- migration

Provides:
- user endpoints
- permission APIs

title: Risk Summary
author: Arasaka PMO
body:
Top risks:
- migration delays
- compliance delay
- rate limiting bottleneck

All risks impact system readiness.
